pages.text: Having witnessed the grandeur of the End Black Knight, you were deeply humbled. After absorbing the essence of its power, you began to harness the might of that legendary swordsman for yourself. Yet, the one thing you could never perfectly replicate was that gleaming greatsword. You could only forge an imitation based on its form and essence. Though merely a fleeting shadow of the original, it is enough to become a blade of legend。

However, as a dark magus who pursues forbidden knowledge, your path has never known the words "cannot be overcome." The imitation, however sharp, is but an echo. How could a true legend be replaced by a mere shadow? You resolved to go straight to the source — not for destruction, but for confrontation; not for replication, but for inheritance.

To earn its acknowledgment, you must return to that desolate End dimension — not as a challenger, but as one who seeks resonance. Abandon any attempt to taint or destroy its form with magic, and instead engage it in a close-quarters dance: within the clash of steel, unravel the promise it guards, until you once again bring it to its knees.

If you can prove, with the blade in your hand, that you are not a thief of power but a worthy successor fit to stand shoulder to shoulder with it and inherit its legacy, then the Watcher shall finally lay down its timeless duty. It will entrust its very existence to you, to face together that destined end — both the conclusion of an ancient vow and the beginning of an undying legend.

$(d)$(o)$(l)$(br2)$(br2)Eques taciturnus ad fores ingentes spectat,$(br)Sidera exsanguia crepuscula regum monstrant,$(br)In sinu atro sacculo vincta est pestis vitis sanguinea,$(br)Via heros non nisi lutum sub pedibus facta est.

$(#CC00CC)$(o)$(l)$(br2)$(br2)Caelum profundum sorbet sonitum tubae obmutescentem,$(br)Cutis obscurata rationis lucernam postremam frangit,$(br)Custos pervigil iam non est qui homo dici queat,$(br)Immota manet sola officii pertinacis munus.

$(5)$(o)$(l)$(br2)$(br2)Magis aetatis posterioris signum exitii rapere volenti,$(br)Quondam eques mucronem infectum purpura erigit,$(br)Conflictus ferri est concertatio inter nobiles,$(br)Solum pugna solitaria verum animi testimonium est.

$(#660066)$(o)$(l)$(br2)$(br2)Nunc tu autem filum fatorum praecidisti,$(br)Denuntians confusionem manu tua cessaturam,$(br)Votum equitis arte magica formabitur,$(br)Et nunc servit Fato destinato atque Supremo!
